user_prompt: X3 game circular avatar frame, World Cup / soccer theme, Turkey. Use reference image 1 as the EXACT target paradigm (a detailed team-color ring with gradient, metallic sheen and engraved texture, plus a flag-textured soccer ball at bottom-center) and reference image 2 for the skeleton/ornaments (top gold crest with gem, side gold diamond clips, bottom gold wings). RING band = red team color, but NOT flat: give it a smooth light-to-dark gradient, subtle metallic sheen and rim light, and fine engraved geometric texture so it reads as an ornate metal-and-enamel frame (match reference image 1 ring quality). Slim gold edge trim. Bottom-center soccer ball = TURKEY flag: red ball with a white crescent and star. Keep cel-shaded glossy highlight on top of the ball so it reads as a real ball, not a flat 2D disc. The flag-ball is the single identity focus; national identity must be instantly recognizable. Keep the EXACT same skeleton, layout, proportions and ornaments and clean cel-shaded X3 game-UI art style. Square 1:1, circular hollow center fully transparent for avatar, fully transparent background, NO text, NO national flag cloth draped over the frame, NO scene background, readable at 256x256.
